component.name: MainNarratorGroup
component.script:
' ---------------------------------------------------------------- ' Viseme table - 9 mouth shapes as rectangle descriptors ' Each entry: [y-offset from lip-centre, width, height, label] ' All drawn relative to mouth anchor at face position ' ---------------------------------------------------------------- sub init() print "MainNarratorGroup: init()" m.sectionLabel = m.top.findNode("sectionLabel") m.narrationText = m.top.findNode("narrationText") m.onAirRect = m.top.findNode("onAirRect") m.onAirLabel = m.top.findNode("onAirLabel") m.videoNode = m.top.findNode("videoFeed") m.zoomLabel = m.top.findNode("zoomLabel") m.videoBg = m.top.findNode("videoBg") m.pulseTimer = m.top.findNode("pulseTimer") m.visemeTimer = m.top.findNode("visemeTimer") m.blinkTimer = m.top.findNode("blinkTimer") m.bobTimer = m.top.findNode("bobTimer") m.faceGroup = m.top.findNode("faceGroup") m.headGroup = m.top.findNode("headGroup")
' Mouth shape nodes m.mouth = m.top.findNode("mouth") m.mouthInner = m.top.findNode("mouthInner") m.mouthTop = m.top.findNode("mouthTop") m.mouthBottom = m.top.findNode("mouthBottom")
' Eye nodes m.eyeL = m.top.findNode("eyeL") m.eyeR = m.top.findNode("eyeR") m.lidL = m.top.findNode("lidL") m.lidR = m.top.findNode("lidR")
m.pulseTimer.observeField("fire", "onPulse") m.visemeTimer.observeField("fire", "onViseme") m.blinkTimer.observeField("fire", "onBlink") m.bobTimer.observeField("fire", "onBob")
m.pulseState = false m.isZoomed = false m.isNarrating = false m.blinkState = 0 ' 0=open 1=half 2=closed 3=half m.bobPhase = 0 ' 0..7 sine approximation m.bobBaseY = 18 ' face group default Y
' Viseme sequence - cycles when narrating ' Shapes: rest, open, oh, ee, oo, fv, th, mbp, wide m.visemeSeq = ["rest","open","oh","ee","rest","mbp","oh","oo","ee","rest","fv","th","open","rest"] m.visemeIdx = 0
' Bob Y offsets (sine approximation, 8 steps) m.bobOffsets = [0, -1, -2, -3, -2, -1, 0, 1]
startVideo() btvSetMouth("rest") end sub
sub startVideo() videoContent = CreateObject("roSGNode", "ContentNode") videoContent.url = "http://commondatastorage.googleapis.com/gtv-videos-bucket/sample/BigBuckBunny.mp4" videoContent.title = "BlogTV Live Feed" videoContent.streamFormat = "mp4" m.videoNode.content = videoContent m.videoNode.control = "play" m.videoNode.loop = true end sub
' ---------------------------------------------------------------- ' Mouth shape engine ' Each viseme adjusts: outer lip rect, inner dark rect, ' top-lip rect, bottom-lip rect ' All coords relative to mouth anchor [0,0] = top-left of mouth area ' ---------------------------------------------------------------- sub btvSetMouth(shape as String) ' Defaults - will be overridden per shape ' mouth outer: translation, width, height, color ' mouthInner: translation, width, height ' mouthTop: translation, width, height ' mouthBottom: translation, width, height
if shape = "rest" ' Thin closed line m.mouth.translation = [0, 10] m.mouth.width = 36 m.mouth.height = 6 m.mouth.color = "0xC07060FF" m.mouthInner.translation = [2, 2] m.mouthInner.width = 32 m.mouthInner.height = 2 m.mouthTop.height = 0 m.mouthBottom.height = 0
else if shape = "open" ' Open mouth, medium m.mouth.translation = [0, 6] m.mouth.width = 38 m.mouth.height = 18 m.mouth.color = "0xC07060FF" m.mouthInner.translation = [3, 3] m.mouthInner.width = 32 m.mouthInner.height = 12 m.mouthTop.translation = [0, 0] m.mouthTop.width = 38 m.mouthTop.height = 4 m.mouthBottom.translation = [0, 14] m.mouthBottom.width = 38 m.mouthBottom.height = 4
else if shape = "oh" ' Rounded O shape m.mouth.translation = [4, 4] m.mouth.width = 28 m.mouth.height = 22 m.mouth.color = "0xC07060FF" m.mouthInner.translation = [5, 4] m.mouthInner.width = 18 m.mouthInner.height = 14 m.mouthTop.translation = [2, 0] m.mouthTop.width = 24 m.mouthTop.height = 5 m.mouthBottom.translation = [2, 17] m.mouthBottom.width = 24 m.mouthBottom.height = 5
else if shape = "ee" ' Wide smile, teeth showing m.mouth.translation = [0, 8] m.mouth.width = 40 m.mouth.height = 12 m.mouth.color = "0xC07060FF" m.mouthInner.translation = [2, 3] m.mouthInner.width = 36 m.mouthInner.height = 6 m.mouthTop.translation = [0, 0] m.mouthTop.width = 40 m.mouthTop.height = 3 m.mouthBottom.translation = [0, 9] m.mouthBottom.width = 40 m.mouthBottom.height = 3
else if shape = "oo" ' Small rounded pucker m.mouth.translation = [8, 5] m.mouth.width = 20 m.mouth.height = 18 m.mouth.color = "0xC07060FF" m.mouthInner.translation = [4, 4] m.mouthInner.width = 12 m.mouthInner.height = 10 m.mouthTop.translation = [2, 0] m.mouthTop.width = 16 m.mouthTop.height = 5 m.mouthBottom.translation = [2, 13] m.mouthBottom.width = 16 m.mouthBottom.height = 5
else if shape = "fv" ' Bottom lip tucked under top teeth m.mouth.translation = [0, 10] m.mouth.width = 36 m.mouth.height = 8 m.mouth.color = "0xC07060FF" m.mouthInner.translation = [2, 2] m.mouthInner.width = 32 m.mouthInner.height = 4 m.mouthTop.translation = [0, 0] m.mouthTop.width = 36 m.mouthTop.height = 10 ' thick top = teeth m.mouthTop.color = "0xE8D8C0FF" ' tooth colour m.mouthBottom.height = 0
else if shape = "th" ' Tongue between teeth m.mouth.translation = [0, 9] m.mouth.width = 34 m.mouth.height = 10 m.mouth.color = "0xC07060FF" m.mouthInner.translation = [4, 2] m.mouthInner.width = 14 m.mouthInner.height = 6 ' tongue tip m.mouthTop.translation = [0, 0] m.mouthTop.width = 34 m.mouthTop.height = 9 m.mouthBottom.height = 0
else if shape = "mbp" ' Lips pressed together (m, b, p sounds) m.mouth.translation = [0, 11] m.mouth.width = 36 m.mouth.height = 4 m.mouth.color = "0xB06050FF" m.mouthInner.height = 0 m.mouthTop.height = 0 m.mouthBottom.height = 0
else if shape = "wide" ' Big open laugh/shout m.mouth.translation = [0, 4] m.mouth.width = 42 m.mouth.height = 24 m.mouth.color = "0xC07060FF" m.mouthInner.translation = [2, 3] m.mouthInner.width = 38 m.mouthInner.height = 18 m.mouthTop.translation = [0, 0] m.mouthTop.width = 42 m.mouthTop.height = 4 m.mouthBottom.translation = [0, 20] m.mouthBottom.width = 42 m.mouthBottom.height = 4 end if
' Reset tooth colour for non-fv shapes if shape <> "fv" m.mouthTop.color = "0xC07060FF" end if end sub
' ---------------------------------------------------------------- ' Animation timers ' ---------------------------------------------------------------- sub onViseme(event as Object) if not m.isNarrating then return m.visemeIdx = m.visemeIdx + 1 if m.visemeIdx >= m.visemeSeq.count() then m.visemeIdx = 0 btvSetMouth(m.visemeSeq[m.visemeIdx]) end sub
sub onBlink(event as Object) m.blinkState = m.blinkState + 1 if m.blinkState > 3 then m.blinkState = 0
if m.blinkState = 0 ' Eyes fully open m.lidL.height = 4 m.lidR.height = 4 else if m.blinkState = 1 ' Half closed m.lidL.height = 8 m.lidR.height = 8 else if m.blinkState = 2 ' Fully closed m.lidL.height = 16 m.lidR.height = 16 else if m.blinkState = 3 ' Opening again - half m.lidL.height = 8 m.lidR.height = 8 ' Reset blink timer to random-ish interval (3-6s) ' Alternate between two durations to fake randomness if m.pulseState = true m.blinkTimer.duration = 3.2 else m.blinkTimer.duration = 5.7 end if end if end sub
sub onBob(event as Object) m.bobPhase = m.bobPhase + 1 if m.bobPhase >= 8 then m.bobPhase = 0 offset = m.bobOffsets[m.bobPhase] m.headGroup.translation = [14, m.bobBaseY + offset] end sub
' ---------------------------------------------------------------- ' Existing handlers ' ---------------------------------------------------------------- sub onSectionTitleChange(event as Object) m.sectionLabel.text = "> " + event.getData() end sub
sub onNarrationTextChange(event as Object) m.narrationText.text = event.getData() end sub
sub onIsNarratingChange(event as Object) narrating = event.getData() m.isNarrating = narrating if narrating = true m.onAirRect.visible = true m.onAirLabel.visible = true m.pulseTimer.control = "start" m.visemeTimer.control = "start" m.bobTimer.control = "start" m.blinkTimer.control = "start" else m.onAirRect.visible = false m.onAirLabel.visible = false m.pulseTimer.control = "stop" m.visemeTimer.control = "stop" m.bobTimer.control = "stop" m.onAirRect.opacity = 1.0 btvSetMouth("rest") m.headGroup.translation = [14, m.bobBaseY] end if end sub
sub onPulse(event as Object) m.pulseState = not m.pulseState if m.pulseState = true m.onAirRect.opacity = 0.3 else m.onAirRect.opacity = 1.0 end if end sub
sub onZoomToggleChange(event as Object) doZoom = event.getData() if doZoom = true m.isZoomed = true m.videoNode.translation = [-265, -60] m.videoNode.width = 1280 m.videoNode.height = 680 m.videoBg.width = 1280 m.videoBg.height = 680 m.videoBg.translation = [-265, -60] m.zoomLabel.text = "[-] Zoom Out (Play/Opt)" else m.isZoomed = false m.videoNode.translation = [10, 10] m.videoNode.width = 1260 m.videoNode.height = 380 m.videoBg.width = 1260 m.videoBg.height = 380 m.videoBg.translation = [10, 10] m.zoomLabel.text = "[+] Zoom In (Play/Opt)" end if end sub
